response.justification: Despite broad engineering experience across languages and domains, the candidate shows minimal direct exposure to JVM ecosystems, enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — core requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks, with only brief, unelaborated mentions of Java in past roles without evidence of deep JVM or IDE tooling contributions.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Proven experience in developer tooling and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: Lack of demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise frameworks like Spring or Hibernate
No evidence of work on IDE internals, language servers, or JVM tooling systems
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang) is misaligned with JVM-focused role requirements
